mapper.select: SELECT r.ROOM_TYPE_ID AS room_type_id, r.FK_HOTEL_ID AS brand_id, h.HOTEL_NAME AS hotel_name, r.ROOM_GRADE AS room_grade, r.BED_TYPE AS bed_type, r.VIEW_TYPE AS view_type, r.ROOM_NAME AS room_name, r.ROOM_SIZE AS room_size, r.MAX_CAPACITY AS max_capacity, r.TOTAL_COUNT AS total_count, r.BASE_PRICE AS base_price FROM ROOM_TYPE r JOIN TBL_HOTEL h ON r.FK_HOTEL_ID = h.HOTEL_ID WHERE r.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' ORDER BY h.HOTEL_NAME
